requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — TCDB Technical Requirements / CISPR 32 Basis (Multimedia and Wireless Equipment)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容辐射——TCDB技术要求 / CISPR 32基础（多媒体及无线设备）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容輻射——TCDB技術要求 / CISPR 32基礎（多媒體及無線設備）

summary.en: Cambodia's TCDB (Telecommunication and Digital Business Regulator) applies technical requirements for electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) emissions as part of the type approval process for wireless and telecom terminal equipment. Cambodia references international and ASEAN-harmonised standards — including CISPR 32 (Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Emission requirements) as a basis for emissions limits applicable to Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, and IoT devices. Manufacturers seeking TCDB type approval must demonstrate EMC emissions compliance through test reports from accredited laboratories. Cambodia's EMC framework is still developing; applicants should verify the current applicable emissions standard and test report requirements directly with TCDB before testing. GDCE (General Department of Customs and Excise) customs clearance for importing devices may also require evidence of TCDB compliance.
summary.zh: 柬埔寨TCDB（电信和数字业务监管机构）在无线及电信终端设备型式批准过程中对电磁兼容（EMC）辐射适用技术要求。柬埔寨参照国际及ASEAN协调标准——包括CISPR 32（多媒体设备电磁兼容辐射要求）——作为适用于Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、LoRa及物联网设备辐射限值的基础。申请TCDB型式批准的制造商须通过认可实验室出具的检测报告证明符合电磁兼容辐射要求。柬埔寨电磁兼容框架仍在发展中；申请人应在测试前直接向TCDB核实当前适用的辐射标准及检测报告要求。进口设备的海关总署（GDCE）清关可能亦须提供TCDB合规证明。
summary.zht: 柬埔寨TCDB（電信和數字業務監管機構）在無線及電信終端設備型式批准過程中對電磁相容（EMC）輻射適用技術要求。柬埔寨參照國際及ASEAN協調標準——包括CISPR 32（多媒體設備電磁相容輻射要求）——作為適用於Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩、LoRa及物聯網設備輻射限值的基礎。申請TCDB型式批准的製造商須通過認可實驗室出具的檢測報告證明符合電磁相容輻射要求。柬埔寨電磁相容框架仍在發展中；申請人應在測試前直接向TCDB核實當前適用的輻射標準及檢測報告要求。進口設備的海關總署（GDCE）清關可能亦須提供TCDB合規證明。

standards_or_laws: TCDB (Telecommunication and Digital Business Regulator, Cambodia) — type approval technical requirements for EMC emissions
CISPR 32 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment: Emission requirements (referenced by Cambodia for international alignment)
ASEAN harmonised technical requirements for telecommunications and radio equipment (ASEAN framework)

summary.en: China addresses EMC emissions for IT and multimedia equipment primarily through GB 9254 (aligned with CISPR 22/32) and GB 17625 (aligned with IEC 61000-3 for harmonics and flicker). Products within CCC scope must be certified before sale in China; others may use self-declaration against applicable GB/T standards. Chinese GB 9254 / CCC EMC emissions documentation is not directly recognised in Cambodia and does not satisfy TCDB type approval EMC requirements.
summary.zh: 中国主要通过GB 9254（与CISPR 22/32接轨）及GB 17625（与IEC 61000-3谐波和闪变接轨）处理IT及多媒体设备的电磁兼容辐射要求。纳入CCC范围的产品在华销售前须通过认证；其他产品可依据适用GB/T标准进行自我声明。中国GB 9254 / CCC电磁兼容辐射文件不被柬埔寨直接认可，不满足TCDB型式批准的电磁兼容要求。
summary.zht: 中國主要通過GB 9254（與CISPR 22/32接軌）及GB 17625（與IEC 61000-3諧波和閃變接軌）處理IT及多媒體設備的電磁相容輻射要求。納入CCC範圍的產品在華銷售前須通過認證；其他產品可依據適用GB/T標準進行自我聲明。中國GB 9254 / CCC電磁相容輻射文件不被柬埔寨直接認可，不滿足TCDB型式批准的電磁相容要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254 — Information technology equipment: Radio disturbance characteristics (SAC/MIIT, aligned with CISPR 22/32)
GB 17625.1 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (SAC, aligned with IEC 61000-3-2)

gap.en: Chinese GB 9254 / CCC EMC emissions documentation is not directly accepted in Cambodia as satisfying TCDB type approval EMC requirements. Although both GB 9254 and CISPR 32 derive from the same CISPR lineage, separate EMC compliance testing meeting TCDB requirements is needed for the Cambodia market. Manufacturers should verify with TCDB the current applicable emissions standard and whether test reports from ILAC-MRA accredited laboratories are accepted. Cambodia's EMC regulatory framework is still maturing; early engagement with TCDB or a local regulatory consultant is recommended.
gap.zh: 中国GB 9254 / CCC电磁兼容辐射文件不被柬埔寨直接接受为满足TCDB型式批准电磁兼容要求的证明。尽管GB 9254和CISPR 32同源于CISPR体系，仍须针对柬埔寨市场单独进行符合TCDB要求的电磁兼容合规测试。制造商应向TCDB核实当前适用的辐射标准，以及是否接受来自ILAC-MRA认可实验室的检测报告。柬埔寨电磁兼容监管框架仍在完善中，建议提前与TCDB或当地监管顾问沟通。
gap.zht: 中國GB 9254 / CCC電磁相容輻射文件不被柬埔寨直接接受為滿足TCDB型式批准電磁相容要求的證明。儘管GB 9254和CISPR 32同源於CISPR體系，仍須針對柬埔寨市場單獨進行符合TCDB要求的電磁相容合規測試。製造商應向TCDB核實當前適用的輻射標準，以及是否接受來自ILAC-MRA認可實驗室的檢測報告。柬埔寨電磁相容監管框架仍在完善中，建議提前與TCDB或當地監管顧問溝通。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory as part of TCDB type approval — EMC emissions compliance required for wireless and multimedia equipment; verify current applicable standard and accepted test report format directly with TCDB
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (for CCC-scope products) or self-declaration (non-CCC) — GB 9254 / GB 17625 compliance required under SAC/MIIT framework

source.publisher: Ministry of Post and Telecommunications (MPTC), Cambodia; Telecommunication and Digital Business Regulator (TCDB), Cambodia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC emissions compliance (referencing CISPR 32 or equivalent) is required as part of TCDB type approval for wireless and multimedia devices in Cambodia. Chinese GB 9254 / CCC EMC documentation is not a direct substitute. Separate EMC testing meeting TCDB requirements is needed. Verify current applicable emissions standards and accepted laboratory accreditation with TCDB before testing, as Cambodia's EMC regulatory framework is still developing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 作为柬埔寨无线及多媒体设备TCDB型式批准的组成部分，须符合电磁兼容辐射要求（参照CISPR 32或等效标准）。中国GB 9254 / CCC电磁兼容文件不可直接替代。须进行满足TCDB要求的单独电磁兼容测试。由于柬埔寨电磁兼容监管框架仍在发展中，测试前请向TCDB核实当前适用的辐射标准及可接受的实验室认可要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 作為柬埔寨無線及多媒體設備TCDB型式批准的組成部分，須符合電磁相容輻射要求（參照CISPR 32或等效標準）。中國GB 9254 / CCC電磁相容文件不可直接替代。須進行滿足TCDB要求的單獨電磁相容測試。由於柬埔寨電磁相容監管框架仍在發展中，測試前請向TCDB核實當前適用的輻射標準及可接受的實驗室認可要求。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Immunity — TCDB Technical Requirements / IEC 61000-4 Series Basis
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容抗扰度——TCDB技术要求 / IEC 61000-4系列基础
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容抗擾度——TCDB技術要求 / IEC 61000-4系列基礎

summary.en: EMC immunity requirements for wireless and telecom terminal equipment in Cambodia are applied by TCDB as part of the type approval process. Cambodia references internationally recognised immunity standards aligned with CISPR 35 and the IEC 61000-4 series for multimedia and telecommunications equipment. Wireless and IoT devices intended for residential or commercial environments in Cambodia must demonstrate immunity to relevant electromagnetic disturbances in accordance with applicable technical requirements referenced by TCDB. Because Cambodia's regulatory framework is still developing, applicants should verify the current immunity standard requirements and accepted test report formats directly with TCDB or through a locally registered regulatory consultant before commissioning immunity testing.
summary.zh: 柬埔寨TCDB在型式批准过程中对无线及电信终端设备适用电磁兼容抗扰度要求。柬埔寨参照与CISPR 35及IEC 61000-4系列接轨的国际认可抗扰度标准，适用于多媒体及电信设备。面向柬埔寨住宅或商业环境的无线及物联网设备须依据TCDB参照的适用技术要求证明对相关电磁骚扰的抗扰能力。由于柬埔寨监管框架仍在发展中，申请人在委托抗扰度测试前，应直接向TCDB或通过当地注册的监管顾问核实当前的抗扰度标准要求及可接受的检测报告格式。
summary.zht: 柬埔寨TCDB在型式批准過程中對無線及電信終端設備適用電磁相容抗擾度要求。柬埔寨參照與CISPR 35及IEC 61000-4系列接軌的國際認可抗擾度標準，適用於多媒體及電信設備。面向柬埔寨住宅或商業環境的無線及物聯網設備須依據TCDB參照的適用技術要求證明對相關電磁騷擾的抗擾能力。由於柬埔寨監管框架仍在發展中，申請人在委託抗擾度測試前，應直接向TCDB或通過當地登記的監管顧問核實當前的抗擾度標準要求及可接受的檢測報告格式。

standards_or_laws: TCDB (Telecommunication and Digital Business Regulator, Cambodia) — type approval technical requirements for EMC immunity
CISPR 35 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment: Immunity requirements (referenced for Cambodia alignment)
IEC 61000-4 series — Electromagnetic compatibility testing and measurement techniques (referenced by Cambodia)

summary.en: China addresses EMC immunity for IT and multimedia equipment through GB/T 17618 (aligned with CISPR 24) and related GB/T standards in the IEC 61000-4 series. CCC certification includes immunity testing for in-scope products. Chinese GB/T 17618 immunity documentation is not directly recognised in Cambodia and does not satisfy TCDB type approval EMC immunity requirements.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB/T 17618（与CISPR 24接轨）及IEC 61000-4系列相关GB/T标准处理IT及多媒体设备的电磁兼容抗扰度。纳入CCC范围的产品认证包含抗扰度测试。中国GB/T 17618抗扰度文件不被柬埔寨直接认可，不满足TCDB型式批准的电磁兼容抗扰度要求。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB/T 17618（與CISPR 24接軌）及IEC 61000-4系列相關GB/T標準處理IT及多媒體設備的電磁相容抗擾度。納入CCC範圍的產品認證包含抗擾度測試。中國GB/T 17618抗擾度文件不被柬埔寨直接認可，不滿足TCDB型式批准的電磁相容抗擾度要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17618 — Information technology equipment: Immunity characteristics (SAC, aligned with CISPR 24)
GB/T 17626 series — Electromagnetic compatibility testing and measurement techniques (aligned with IEC 61000-4)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 17618 / CCC immunity documentation is not accepted as satisfying TCDB Cambodia EMC immunity requirements. Although both systems derive from IEC/CISPR standards, Cambodia market compliance requires separate immunity testing meeting TCDB technical requirements. The specific immunity standard applicable to a given device category should be verified with TCDB before testing. Manufacturers should not assume CISPR 24-based Chinese test reports satisfy CISPR 35-based Cambodian requirements. Cambodia's EMC regulatory framework is still maturing and requirements may evolve.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 17618 / CCC抗扰度文件不被接受为满足柬埔寨TCDB电磁兼容抗扰度要求的证明。尽管两者均源自IEC/CISPR标准，柬埔寨市场合规仍须进行满足TCDB技术要求的单独抗扰度测试。应在测试前向TCDB核实适用于特定设备类别的抗扰度标准。制造商不应假设基于CISPR 24的中国检测报告可满足柬埔寨基于CISPR 35的要求。柬埔寨电磁兼容监管框架仍在完善中，要求可能有所演变。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 17618 / CCC抗擾度文件不被接受為滿足柬埔寨TCDB電磁相容抗擾度要求的證明。儘管兩者均源自IEC/CISPR標準，柬埔寨市場合規仍須進行滿足TCDB技術要求的單獨抗擾度測試。應在測試前向TCDB核實適用於特定設備類別的抗擾度標準。製造商不應假設基於CISPR 24的中國檢測報告可滿足柬埔寨基於CISPR 35的要求。柬埔寨電磁相容監管框架仍在完善中，要求可能有所演變。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory as part of TCDB type approval — EMC immunity compliance required for wireless and multimedia equipment; verify current applicable immunity standard and accepted test report format directly with TCDB
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (for CCC-scope products) or self-declaration — GB/T 17618 / GB/T 17626 series compliance under SAC/MIIT framework

source.publisher: Ministry of Post and Telecommunications (MPTC), Cambodia; Telecommunication and Digital Business Regulator (TCDB), Cambodia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC immunity requirements (referencing CISPR 35 and IEC 61000-4 series) apply to wireless and multimedia devices as part of TCDB type approval in Cambodia. Chinese GB/T 17618 / CCC immunity documentation does not substitute. Separate immunity testing meeting TCDB requirements is needed for the Cambodia market. Verify current applicable immunity standards and accepted laboratory accreditation with TCDB before testing, as Cambodia's framework is still developing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 电磁兼容抗扰度要求（参照CISPR 35及IEC 61000-4系列）适用于柬埔寨TCDB型式批准流程中的无线及多媒体设备。中国GB/T 17618 / CCC抗扰度文件不可替代。须进行满足TCDB要求的单独抗扰度测试。由于柬埔寨框架仍在发展中，测试前请向TCDB核实当前适用的抗扰度标准及可接受的实验室认可要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 電磁相容抗擾度要求（參照CISPR 35及IEC 61000-4系列）適用於柬埔寨TCDB型式批准流程中的無線及多媒體設備。中國GB/T 17618 / CCC抗擾度文件不可替代。須進行滿足TCDB要求的單獨抗擾度測試。由於柬埔寨框架仍在發展中，測試前請向TCDB核實當前適用的抗擾度標準及可接受的實驗室認可要求。
